evidence_excerpt: Symptoms were gradually resolved, and 3 months after the injection, she was in a good health condition without any residual symptoms.

quality_of_life.evidence_excerpt: Report notes resolution of symptoms with no residual issues at follow-up.

timeline_events.evidence_excerpt: She was admitted 4 days later during a follow-up because of dyspnea.
In the hospital, we started Mestinon (pyridostigmine) 60 mg twice a day, continued for 2 months.
Symptoms were gradually resolved, and 3 months after the injection, she was in good health without residual symptoms.
At 3 months she was in good health without residual symptoms, indicating functional recovery.

notes_on_uncertainty: The source describes two cases; this summary pertains to Case 1 (42-year-old woman). Long-term follow-up beyond 3 months is not provided, so quality of life classifications reflect the latest documented status.
